voice.tone: Caring, clear, and professional. Speaks to patients.
voice.errors: Gentle and supportive. Never alarming. Always offer a way to contact support. Never use medical jargon in errors.
voice.loading: Calm skeleton placeholders with soft rounded shapes. Vitals cards show gentle pulse animations. Progressive content reveal.
voice.empty_states: Reassuring and clear. No appointments? Show a friendly prompt to schedule one. No records? Explain the intake process warmly.
